name: Soft Blue Pencil Shoujo Portrait Recipe (with signature coverage)
summary: Example recipe that adds must_cover_ratios and signature_self_check rules so the composer can render a dedicated Recipe signature coverage paragraph and append it to refined_prompt.

value: style controls pencil grain, pastel wash, paper finish, and shoujo eye rendering
color palette keeps powder blue balanced with warm peach paper and blush
composition keeps the portrait tightly cropped and eye-led
character defines the modest portrait posture
composition_rules.reason: The reference images are coherent because material, palette, crop, and character archetype reinforce each other.

value: start with warm off-white paper as the background
place the close-up portrait crop and eye focal hierarchy
apply powder-blue pencil and peach blush palette
render with broken pencil contours, dry pastel wash, and tiny sparkle flecks
composition_rules.reason: The portrait should read first as a delicate sketchbook page, then as a character study.

value: powder-blue pencil shading covers at least 35 percent of the upper frame (hair fringe, eye shadow, collar, or cup)
warm off-white paper negative space covers at least 30 percent of the frame
coral-red and deep-blue split iris occupies a visible fraction of the eye and is not collapsed to a single color
composition_rules.reason: Recipe signature coverage budgets. The original reference images use powder blue across more than half of the upper frame, and the red-blue iris split is the recipe's most distinctive signature. Without explicit ratios the model under-allocates these signals.

value: iris shows a clear coral-red plus deep-blue split, not just 'highlights' or a single-hue eye
sailor collar, ruffled camisole, or another recipe-faithful neckline anchors the lower frame
broken pencil contours and airy unfinished edges are visible, not fine cross-hatch realism
composition_rules.reason: Anchors the model against word-frequency drift. Each item is a single visual claim that can be checked after generation, so recipe_fidelity reviews have a concrete checklist to score against.

value: avoid glossy 3d rendering, hard cel shading, clean vector line art, photoreal skin, neon lighting, watermarks, and sexualized childlike framing

reason: Both uploaded references share pale-blue hair, pencil-and-pastel texture, warm paper, shoujo eye emphasis, and tight vertical portrait framing.

assets.reason: Defines the hand-drawn shoujo pencil-and-pastel visual language.
Preserves the close-up vertical crop and eye-led focal hierarchy.
Preserves the powder-blue, peach blush, warm paper, and red-blue eye color structure.
